string.text: Mutant meat skewers

2 small skewered meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and chili pepper. The cheapest hot meal available in the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Mutant meat chops

A small hot meal of grilled mutant meat chops mixed with garlic, peppers and mushrooms. A cheap alternative to the more popular boar beef.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Rare mutant meat chops

Portion of grilled rare mutant meat chops. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the mutant.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Fat bacon

Slices of fat and greasy bacon made from the flesh of a mutant.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Meat chops

A small portion of mutant meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. The most popular warm meal among stalkers.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Mutant goulash

A small hot meal made from mutant meat spiced with chilies and mixed with mushrooms.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Rare mutant meat goulash

A small hot meal made from rare mutant meat spiced with chilies and mixed with mushrooms.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Grilled hand

Grilled hand, ready to be eaten. WARNING: Most Zoners consider eating the meat of hands as cannibalistic and immoral. However, certain factions, such as bandits and mercenaries, include it in their meals so as to show their superiority over other groups.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
The Masculine Meal

A portion of grilled rare mutant meat, served with mushrooms and spices. An expensive meal, eaten most commonly by veteran Stalkers to celebrate accomplishment of difficult missions.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Meat chops

A small portion of mutant meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the mutant.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
Mutant flesh

A popular choice in the Zone, the mutant flesh has a good taste and high nutritional value. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
fatty mutant chop

The most popular meat in the Zone. Nutritious and hardly contaminated. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
common mutant meat

Common mutant meat is used as a cheap alternative to the more popular mutant mutant fat. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
simple meat chunk

Simple meat chunk is a common dietary component in the Zone. Tasty, with high nutritional value, a popular choice among stalkers. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Stringy meat

Stringy meat is very stringy and thus really not suited for eating. Although a rare peice of meat of fearsome beasts, the price of the meat is not very high due to its limited use. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] high-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Stringy meat chops

Similar to stringy meat, Stringy meat chops is very stringy and thus not suited for eating. The price of the meat is not very high due to its limited use. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] high-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Mutant hand

The hands orgin seems to be human so eating their meat is considered cannibalistic and immoral. However, certain factions, such as bandits and mercenaries, include it in their meals so as to show their superiority over other groups. Can be sold to the scientists who make better use of it.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Mutated arm

A severed arm of an mutant, its extremely deformed/mutated and is a valuable research object.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Humanoid hand

This is a hand of a former human being who lived or worked in the Exclusion Zone and were subjected to extreme amounts of radiation and psy-influence when the second Chernobyl incident occurred. After many years of being in this state, they possess only a frail body with bones and half-rotten flesh clearly visible. For this reason, the creatures very much resemble re-animated dead bodies, however they are very much alive and almost permanently hungry and thus can become a threat when encountered in packs. Severed hand not only constitutes a scientific research material but in many cases can also be used to identify the person to whom the hand belonged.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Heavy chunk of rare meat

A heavy chunk of rare mutant meat. , this meat is highly valued by veteran stalkers who are willing to buy it for fairly high prices. The cook on Skadovsk uses this meat as one of the ingredients of the so called masculine meal, although only few claim that it tastes better than boar meat. Can be sold to the scientists. Furthermore, it provides the best quality animal fat available in the Zone which can be used for the purposes of very effective gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] high-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Chunk of meat

A good chunk of meat. Nutritious and hardly contaminated. Can be sold to the scientists. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] high-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Small portion of common mutant meat

A small portion of a mutated meat. A cheap and commonly found food that is said to strengthen your heart after being cooked in open fire. Can be sold to the scientists.
 
 %c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] cookable
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
Mutant eye

Mutated, swollen eye of an mutant has a number of strange characteristics, the most interesting and potentially useful of which is the ability to repair even severe damage sustained to the organ. The specifics of this process are hitherto unknown, although the discovery of the mechanism behind it would most certainly revolutionize modern medicine by providing cures for many diseases. You can play a part in speeding up the progress of science and save the lives of innocent people by selling eyes of fleshes to the scientists.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant leg

Small chunk of a mutant leg, its inner bones can be used to produce various drugs, for example anti-radiation serums.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant tail

The mutant tail is especially suited for lab tests.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Longer mutant tail

The fur is reportedly soft like no other. It is also said that it will keep you warm even in most vicious snowstorms and blizzards. For these reasons, tails of this quality are in high demand.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant jaw

Contain a special gland which produces an enzyme capable of dissolving the skin and simultaneously preventing blood from clotting. Discovering the enzyme's composition could be the cornerstone of a whole series of great medical advances. Mutant jaws is one of the most popular pieces of jewelry found in the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Humanoid leg

Feet and legs contain a huge number of highly elastic tendons. This explains the beast's ability to perform its characteristic long leaps at its prey. The scientists still look for potential uses of the this type of leg, and will be grateful for each specimen you bring to their base.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant horn

A mutant horn, Its exact molecular composition is unknown, but we know for a fact that its tip is as durable and sharp as a diamond, which explains why the beast is able to cut through armour with ease. This item is in high demand as it is visibly similar to a rhino horn. Rumour has it that once upon a time a few poachers arrived in the Zone with the aim of acquiring the horn and selling it on the black market. To their surprise, however, the mutants carrying these horns did not make such easy targets as rhinos, so the poachers were never heard from again. All that remains of them are some unpleasant memories and belongings which indicate where they must have been ripped to pieces by these vicious mutants. the horn can also be used as a crude sharpening tool, but utmost caution should be exercised because it can break, preventing the careless stalker from selling this valuable specimen.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Mutant claw

Its exact molecular composition is unknown, but we know for a fact that it is as durable and sharp as a diamond, which explains why the claw of this mutant is able to cut through armour with ease.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Strange mutant eye

A strange mutated, yellow eye. The glow surrounding the big pupil made the lurker's eye a matter of interest among local hunters. The scientists still look for potential uses of the eye.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Strange tail

Scientists is still searching for the characteristics of this strange tail.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Skinny mutant hand

A skinny hand with long fingers. It seems that the skin around the fingertips is badly torn, which explains all the blood covering the fingers. The scientists will gladly examine it in the hope of finding the source of mutation responsible for its psy-related powers.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Brain matter

Scientists would like to study it in order to identify more of this strange mutants abilities.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Brain tissue

This brain tissue have potent mental powers and it's safe to say that these powers have their origin in their brain. What's interesting, every mutant possessing abilities related to psy waves has a brain of similar structure. The scientists will pay handsomely for this tissue. It has a smell reminiscent of a sour pumpkin.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] extremely valuable
Radiated hand

Seems to use its hand when mentally attacking its prey. The scientists will gladly examine it in the hope of finding the source of mutation responsible for its psy-related powers. Smells like old socks and bad kimchee.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Tail

This tail is used as a symbol of awareness to other stalkers.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Rare humanoid hand

Found in the belly of this mutant is this unknown hand may prove useful for the scientists who will gladly examine it. Smells like old socks and bad kimchee.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Rare mutant eye

The scientists would be very eager to lay their hands on it, so they're willing to pay a high price for any specimen.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Strange mutated hand

Scientists will gladly examine it in the hope of finding the source of mutation. Smells like old socks and bad kimchee.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] very rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Mutated beak

While many stalkers consider crows no more than pests, more insightful ones acknowledge their usefulness in tackling the many challenges the Zone presents. While murders of crows can prove invaluable navigating and evading danger on the empty streets of Chernobyl and Pripyat, it's only after their death when their true value is manifested.
 
The population of crows grows constantly in spite of the increased knowledge of usefulness of their beaks. It seems accelerated adaptation, typical among Zone's fauna, has provided them with a sped-up reproduction cycle resulting in up to 4 egg lays a year. Their prolonged life-span, of up to 20 years, has given them extraordinary intelligence manifested especially when many crows are in proximity.
 
This last effect has led to a rather peculiar custom among the some of the Zone-dwellers which - as rumor has it - was introduced by the very first Stalkers who arrived in the Zone after the Second Incident. The ritual - aptly referred to as "The Beak" - involves taking a pulverized beak from the eldest crow in the murder and creating a special mixture. When the concoction is consumed by the light of the full moon, it allows one's mind to temporarily merge with the multi-consciousness shared by all crows in the Zone. No one knows what happens to a fragile human mind when it is subjected to such an experience, but some speculate that this is what led the Stalker Noah to build his Arc in a desperate attempt to preserve whatever possible from the inevitable cataclysm that is about to once again fall upon this already devastated land.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Grey matter

Grey matter from some of the poor people were working in numerous underground labouratories in which they were sealed from the outside world and exposed to tremendous amounts of radiation, which produced an unknown creature, its still greatly in demand by the scientific community. It can also be used to repair parts of outfits, but this process results in all remaining organic material being lost.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] technological item
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] broken beyond repair
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant liver

The liver of a mutant, having undergone severe changes due to a toxic diet and a lack of clean drinking water in the Zone. The liver is of particular interest to scientists due to its potential for aiding research in medicine for liver diseases.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] the mutated part of the body
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific instance
Radiated heart

Pulse when on the pursuit reaches 250 beats per minute, which is unthinkable for non-atherogenic healthy individuals of the same weight category. This endurance makes this heart an interesting subject for study, but because of its prevalence, the rates for it among scientists are very small.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant thyroid

Long-term residence in radiation-contaminated territories resulted in the fact that the mutant thyroid gland has multiplied in size. At the moment the hyperthyroidism after the change of generations is not acquired, but is a hereditary disease. Symptoms: increased food intake, increased activity, behaviour changes, nervousness, hair loss. These acquired skills are not destroyed, but rather allowed the mutated animals to quickly displace their healthy relatives and to occupy a high position in the food chain. Great interest for scientists is not due to the study of mechanisms and effects of disease.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Minor claw

An unknown clar found in the belly of the beast, the claws have an unknown structure, due to which they can easily cut jumpsuits. Scientists and military believe that a thorough study of them will help to create new highly durable materials and armour based on them.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Mutant fang

Strange mutant fang found in the belly of this mutant, posing a considerable threat to anything caught in its strike, this fang spans a length of 30 centimetres. It is of no particular interest to scientists in the Zone due to its lackluster composition and strength. The fang is commonly used as a trophy among stalkers and has found its way as a collector's item outside of the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Radiated mutant heart

This heart have an unstudied ability - it secretes special enzymes which halt the coagulation process caused by incompatible blood types. Thanks to that, clotting does not occur even if the blood groups are different. The studies on the way this mechanism works and the composition of the enzyme will allow scientists to solve the problem of blood donor for patients with rare blood groups, as well as, probably, will open new doors for medicine.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
common mutant fang

This fang are used for tearing and holding their prey. Due to the tremendous jaw pressure of the mutant, it bites through most of the protective equipment used in the Zone. The teeth themselves are not too strong and are routinely replaced throughout life. Scientists are not particularly interested in them, unlike collectors from the outside of the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
Rare mutant brain

Seems to have telepathic skills, which are absolutely unstudied by the science. That's why this mutants organs are desirable by scientists and mercenaries. The brain, as the main source of his telepathic abilities, has a top-priority in this list. It's mass is a 0.5-1.5 times bigger than a human brain. There's no any external differences. Because of its size and structure the brain can be easily damaged during extraction: wasted organ can't be used in any scientific researches.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Grand mutant heart

This heart of this mutant has grown into a triple sized organ. Of great interest to scientists for is its possession of a high level of regeneration.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
Psi Brain

Have powerful physic abilities, for example, the ability to induce "hallucinations" upon prey. These illusions are extremely convincing, often capable of inflicting very real trauma through currently unknown means. Interestedly, scientists say that while they've identified the region of the brain responsible for the psionic abilities, it's evident that the region is "juvenile" in both development and evolutionary potential. Scientists will pay generously for samples of such tissues. 
 
%c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] Rare scientific specimen
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] High value
Horse meat

A piece of meat high in both nutrition and radiation. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. Source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
%c[d_red]WARNING:
 
%c[default]Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
%c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
%c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] low-tier mutant meat
%c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] not cookable
%c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] toxic food
%c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] radiation poisoning: %c[ui_gray_1] +646 mSv
Horse tail

A long, frayed tail, presumably from a local horse. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity.
 
%c[ui_gray_2]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] mutated body part
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[ui_gray_2] common scientific specimen
